comment: Labels identical; both model paper entity (document/contribution).
Exact lexical match and same author semantics.
Exact lexical match; both model conference event.
Same label and domain semantics (administrator role).
Exact lexical match and comparable class constraints.
Program committee member ≈ Member_PC (reviewer / PC member role); lexical labels differ but semantics align.
Reviewer role in CMT aligns with Member_PC (PC reviewer) in ConfOf; not exact lexical match.
Chairman (CMT) corresponds to Chair_PC (ConfOf); structural equivalence in role.
hasAuthor (Paper → Author) is inverse/semantically equivalent to writtenBy (Contribution → Author) in ConfOf.
submitPaper (Author→Paper) corresponds to writes (Author→Contribution) in ConfOf.
CMT Review is a review document; ConfOf Reviewing_event is the reviewing process/event — related but not equivalent.
Document (generic) in CMT relates to Contribution in ConfOf (papers/posters/etc.); partial overlap.
PaperAbstract is a subtype of Paper in CMT; maps closely to Paper in ConfOf though one is an abstract variant.
